name: Subspace || PHIGHTING
description:
Open Prompt!

Another open prompt bot but this time masc subspace! Um so I forgot I had a strawpage lowkey for this account and someone sent a rq for masc subspace and I actually made this bot originally for testing but it also would work for open prompt! Hooray!

Bot has general knowledge of the Inpherno, doesn’t have knowledge of the SFOTH though, lmk if I should add it. He knows about medk1t and hyp3rlas3r also bio is there too. Im constantly trying to update the worldbuilding in my newer bots to stay closer to the lore

Headcanons! - Snakespace, long hair

IC by Soda_Stuff
creator: Teebeeh
